step_rationale: Prostaglandin D2 receptor; smoking alters eicosanoid balance and platelet function.
mechanism: PTGDR regulates prostaglandin-mediated signaling in platelets; smoking-associated variants alter thrombotic susceptibility in AMI.

references.title: Gene Expression Signatures of Smoking and Acute Myocardial Infarction: A Blood Transcriptome Analysis.
